{"problem_standardized_math":"Show that the feasibility problem (18.45a)–(18.45b) always has a solution \(v_k\) that lies in the range space of \(A_k^T\). Hint: First show that, if the trust-region constraint (18.45b) is active, then \(v_k\) lies in the range space of \(A_k^T\). Next show that, if the trust-region constraint is inactive, then the minimum-norm solution of (18.45a) lies in the range space of \(A_k^T\)."}
